spec.description: postgres exporter Dashboard for display important postgreSQL metric

spec.title: Average query runtime
spec.description: Source: pg_stat_statements.total_time / pg_stat_statements.calls

spec.title: PostgreSQL Version
spec.description: Source: server_version_num

spec.title: Tuples fetched/returned
spec.description:
Source: pg_stat_database

* tup_fetched: rows needed to satisfy queries
* tup_returned: rows read/scanned

spec.title: Transactions
spec.description: 1 Minute rate of transactions committed or rollback.

spec.title: Replication lag
spec.description:
Lag behind master in seconds.

Only available on a standby System.

spec.title: Transaction rate
spec.description:
Transactions committed + roolback per minute

Source: pg_stat_database,xact_commit + xact_rollback

spec.title: Tuples inserts/updates/deletes
spec.description: Source: pg_stat_database

spec.title: Tuples fetched/returned
spec.description:
Source: pg_stat_database

* tup_fetched: rows needed to satisfy queries
* tup_returned: rows read/scanned

spec.title: Locks by state
spec.description: Source: pg_locks

spec.title: Deadlocks by database
spec.description:
Should be 0 

Source: pg_stat_database

With log_lock_waits turned on, deadlocks will be logged to the PostgreSQL Logfiles.

spec.title: Temporary files by database
spec.description: Should be 0. If temporary files are created, it can indicate insufficient work_mem. With log_temp_files the creation of temporary files are logged to the PostgreSQL Logfiles.

spec.title: Transaction rate
spec.description:
Transactions committed + roolback per minute

Source: pg_stat_database,xact_commit + xact_rollback

spec.title: Commit Ratio
spec.description: Transaction committed vs rollbacked

spec.title: Shared Buffer Hits
spec.description: Shared buffer hits vs reads from disc

spec.title: Active clients
spec.description:
Clients executing Statements.

Source: pg_stat_activity

spec.title: Connections by state (stacked)
spec.description: View: pg_stat_activity

spec.title: I/O Read/Write time
spec.description:
* blk_read_time: Time spent reading data file blocks by backends in this database, in milliseconds
* blk_write_time: Time spent writing data file blocks by backends in this database, in milliseconds

track_io_timings needs to be activated

spec.title: Tuples inserts/updates/deletes
spec.description: Source: pg_stat_database

spec.title: Connections by database (stacked)
spec.description: View: pg_stat_activity

spec.title: Locks by state
spec.description: Source: pg_locks

spec.title: Deadlocks by database
spec.description:
Should be 0 

Source: pg_stat_database

With log_lock_waits turned on, deadlocks will be logged to the PostgreSQL Logfiles.

spec.title: Temporary files by database
spec.description: Should be 0. If temporary files are created, it can indicate insufficient work_mem. With log_temp_files the creation of temporary files are logged to the PostgreSQL Logfiles.

spec.title: Total database size
spec.description:
Size of all databases in $Instance.

Source: pg_database_size()

spec.title: Shared Buffer Hits
spec.description: Shared buffer hits vs reads from disc

spec.title: Commit Ratio
spec.description: Transaction committed vs rollbacked

spec.title: Connections by state (stacked)
spec.description: View: pg_stat_activity

spec.title: Transactions
spec.description: 1 Minute rate of transactions committed or rollback.

spec.title: PostgreSQL Uptime
spec.description: Source: pg_postmaster_start_time()

spec.title: Shared Buffers
spec.description: Setting: shared_buffers in PostgreSQL.conf

spec.title: Max Connections
spec.description: Setting: max_connections in postgreSQL.conf

spec.title: Max Replication Lag
spec.description:
Max Replication lag behind master in seconds

Only available on a standby system.

Source: pg_last_xact_replay_timestamp

Use: pg_stat_replication for Details.

spec.title: Connections used
spec.description: Percentage of max_connections used

spec.title: Query rate
spec.description:
Statements executed per Minute.

Source: pg_stat_statements.calls

spec.title: PostgreSQL Exporter
